channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: spaceX IPO — 330 replies — 1320.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
spaceX IPO

Open thread • Replies: 330 • Updated: 2026-06-12 18:24 UTC

OP

are we ready for the biggest scam in history of histories?

ELON MUSK, YOU FAGGGOT

when will your ponzi scheme finally collapse, you fucking hobo

Early replies (first 3)

62351469
>>62351461
like 8 different brokers and crypto apps have shilled this shit to me fucking lmao

are they gonna rape retail instantly or let it pump for a few days before the raping?

62351500
It's actually going to be a repeat of the ICP ico isn't it?

62351509
>>62351469
>are they gonna rape retail instantly or let it pump for a few days before the raping?
supposedly this is entering indexes in 15 days

total scam of scams. can't believe this is fucking happening. everyone (ameriburgers) about to get raped

i'm not american but I would've voted for the faggot. but this...
it would've either been: continuation of woke lunacy or scams

hard times
>https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AEB6ibtdPZc

>are they gonna
the cult is real. it will pump and potentially crater with ai bust in 6-12 months (or god knows when or if)

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62359158
AAAHHHHHH IT'S CRASHING!

62359168
>>62358995
>...until war with China happens and Americans discover how far behind we truly are.
lol
please tell us

young Chinese want to fight even LESS than Westeners

https://medium.com/@topbosstalk/how-ballpoint-tips-became-chinas-toughest-lesson-in-precision-f4f58c10ced7

https://theasymmetric.substack.com/p/china-ballpoint-pen-machine-tools

62359176
spacex just needs to do an easy 7000x and i am set for life with just one share and spacex at a cool 14 thousand trillion dollar marketcap.

62359180
>>62355760
When it goes to $90 next year, you better shut the fuck up and not complain since you're betting on them reaching Mars.

62359191
I hope SpaceX rips to 5 Trilly

62359195
>>62358206
With the Space X money, Elon is going to officially become richer than Rockefeller was at his peak.
Rockefeller did it through the total monopolization of the American oil industry to such an extreme level that the government actually did something anti-corporation for once and forced Standard Oil to break up because the company had the government by the balls.
Elon is doing it entirely off the back of a declining car company and one of the companies that's deepest into the red on the face of the planet, all by spewing bullshit promises that people still somehow buy into even though 99% of them haven't come true.
When did the world become so fucking retarded? Holy shit.

62359200
massive
MASSIVE
W
today

62359219
>>62358022
>and when starship goes live it'll be exponentially cheaper than data centers on Earth
You have to be retarded enough to qualify for neetbux if you think taking satellites to space with a rocket and having them communicate wirelessly can be cheaper than trucking a bunch of materials to a field, building a concrete box and filling it with GPUs.

62359221
>>62359195
over 500 succesful booster landings of the falcon 9, the most launched rocket on earth with over 60% of all launches and over 90% of all mass to space. including the only way for us astronauts to reach the iss. spacex has delivered so far. you have elon derangement syndrome

62359228
>>62351461
Remember how Elons tweeting got him in trouble with the SEC. How it affected TSLA stock. What if that was predictive programming.

Then again...

What if him getting high with Joe RoGAIN was a message that his stock will shoot up?

62359233
>>62359219
and the building a nuclear power plant beside it or tapping into a pipeline and burning natural gas to power it...

62359249
>>62359219
>cheaper than trucking a bunch of materials to a field, building a concrete box and filling it with GPUs.
Uh oh turns out that field actually has a rare endangered worm species on it potentially. And the power lines might pass through an important deer breeding ground. How does 5 years of court nonsense and environmental studies sound instead?

62359251
>>62359228
when i see elon smoke a doob, that's a buy signal. it means the stonk price is going to get high

62359258
Why do my SPCX shares use BBBYQs cusip?

62359265
>>62359221
They could have 10k succesful launches and nothing would change. What matters is whether they can make positive net income, which they can't.
The space data centers is just the latest bullshit they are making up to keep the show going. 5 years ago they were parroting that starship would have killed airlines by now. Once the data center hype dies down, they will make something else up.

62359287
>>62359249
Only like 5% of the planet gives a shit about those kinds of things. The Brazillians burn down parts of the Amazon to build shit all the time. The africans do the same to build mines, etc.
Even if the entirety of the USA wasn't competitive as a data center location, jumping from that to space makes as much sense as if they had tried to send clothing factories to fucking space instead of China in the 90s.

62359305
>>62359287
>just build the data centers in china, not space

62359327
>>62359265
nobody gives a fuck about how much money they currently make nerd. positive net income lol what the fuck world do you think we live in. they will make money when everyone buys the data centers in space or they mine asteroids or some shit. just buy the hype or stay poor loser, learn 2 stonks.

62359339
>>62358861
This is along the same line of argument as "B-but TSLA is the market cap of all car companies combined!".

Kek

62359356
>>62351461
I put in for £20k's worth and only managed to nab just over £5k's worth.

62359359
>>62359339
i will take the cybercab to the asian massage parlour with my spacex profits in the future. thanks elon

62359369
>>62359249
Anon, wake up. It's 2026. Nobody gives a shit about worms. All the cool kids are getting their own nuclear reactors and they can build them wherever they want. If you run out of land, you can just take it from someone else.

62359372
>>62359356
you got lucky actually
anyways how did you even lift 20,000 pounds?

62359390
>>62359369
it was never about the worms, its so bureaucrats and "consultants" can make busy work for themselves and feel a little rush from the power of delaying everything by years to get paid. parasites

62359442
>>62359258
Source?

62359498
>>62357919
Better than I thought, but you're still paying $5-6m to orbit a "datacenter" that's about 170x H100s of compute. With no way to upgrade or sell the HW as it ages out. The self-contained off-coast ones seem more plausible.

62359515
>>62359390
Hold the spaceX bag, that will show those damn bureaucrats

62359532
>>62359442
They have a lot of intel on the matter over in /GME/ You should go ask them. >>62350482
They have been keeping close tabs on this. They call it "The Cusip Conundrum". BBBYQ CUSIP keeps showing up on securities not associated with BBBYQ,

62359598
>>62359339
tesla stock hasnt change much in the last 4 years or so? why exactly is it worth that much? p/e ratio is at over 300

62359635
>>62359598
humanoid robots and robot cars and hype

item.title: No regrets selling BTC?? — 88 replies — 352.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
No regrets selling BTC??

Open thread • Replies: 88 • Updated: 2026-06-12 18:20 UTC

OP

Some talk about regretting it.

Anyone sold and still thinks it was the right move?

If you had the cash from that sale sitting in your account today, would you buy BTC again? Because I definitely would.

Early replies (first 3)

62339349
I sold my last bitcoin last year. Shitcoin is dead. AI is dead. Time to start acting like an african american.

62339372
>>62339349
Maybe regrets for buying? Should have bought chainlink

62339382
I rotated into XMR at like $105k, no regrets at all.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62351090
>>62350283
Aave performs well as a DeFi platform, but the token itself is struggling.

62351106
>>62339883
Taking profits is never a mistake. Calling the end of crypto has historically been a much tougher bet.

62351114
>ETHEREUM

62351129
>>62345772
It's real until macro, ETFs, institutions, and changing market structure decide otherwise.

62351159
>>62339328
>Anyone sold and still thinks it was the right move
It's the definition of a bottom.

62352277
>>62351090
Hmmm, some people are here for the product, some are here for the chart. They're not always the same crowd.

62352286
>>62350315
Ethereum has certainly built one of the strongest ecosystems in crypto.

62354098
>>62351129
You have a point there

62354803
>>62350283
Maybe this is how people finally start exploring BTC in DeFi. Participation is still tiny. Imagine what happens if even 1% starts becoming 2%, then 5%.

62354820
>>62351106
I've actually earned more from memecoins than utility coins lately lol.

62354827
>>62339328
Anyone bullish on avalanche?

62355050
>>62339328
I sold when the Epstein files dropped. Feels good.

62355133
>>62354803
That’s the part a lot of people overlook. If TBVs actually work as intended, I think people are underestimating how much TVL native BTC use cases could pull in.

62355136
>>62355050
Time will tell whether it was the right call, but at least you acted according to your move.

62355617
>>62355133
It's crazy that DeFi security is still one of the biggest problems in the space.

62355631
>>62354827
Buy avax today and sell @ $100

62355632
>>62339417
Monero programmers, like the telegram founder, can be compromised
And monero is based on bitcoin. The entire crypto market exists because of all the money in bitcoin which is now backed by the US government.

62356269
>>62355617
At this point, thorough audits and multiple layers of review should be the standard, not a nice bonus anon.

62356538
>>62355631
What's your basis?

62357046
>>62345600
Probably the better route. We've seen too many centralized services blow up over the years, so you can't really blame people for preferring fully decentralized setups.

62357057
>>62355632
What about ZEC?

62357077
ICP

62357115
>>62339328
I sold at 116k I dont regret it at all and have about 2 mil waiting for sept-dec buy in.

62357126
>>62339328
I can never regret buying BTC desu, I bought back in around 70K and will DCA more if price goes below 60K. I'm also staking a little BTC on babylon for some extra yield

62357923
>>62355632
>Monero programmers, like the telegram founder, can be compromised
yeah just like the bitcoin developers right? they're the ones who control bitcoin?

it's a good question though, what if they were? miners would have to agree on consensus on which code to accept. if github ever refused to host monero's code then it would just move to .onion or .i2p

62359525
>>62357046
That's how it goes. They've already got GoMining, Ledger, and a16z involved, so let's see who they bring in next.

62359541
>>62357057
ZEC is interesting. If the privacy narrative picks up again, it's usually one of the first names people bring up.

62359557
>>62339328
I literally don't care about it. Mogged by virtually everything else over the last couple of years.

Also why is faggot shit like dogecoin still worth billions of dollars.

>in b4 bottom signal
Probably.

62359588
>>62357126
Sounds like you've got a plan and you're sticking to it. Hard to ask for much more than that. I wouldn't be surprised if more people follow suit over time. The $4B+ TVL shows there's already plenty of interest.

62359608
>>62359557
The market has a weird habit of rewarding the things nobody can rationally explain.

item.title: Some 16 year old told me he had worked a full week nonstop, so he was told he had to take the next five days off. — 79 replies — 223.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
Some 16 year old told me he had worked a full week nonstop, so he was told he had to take the next five days off.

Open thread • Replies: 79 • Updated: 2026-06-12 18:05 UTC

OP

Some 16 year old told me he had worked a full week nonstop, so he was told he had to take the next five days off. I told him that was good.

I told him that most people will not make it in today’s economy when $150,000 is considered middle class. He replied that $150,000 is a lot of money. I said sure, but the average American salary is around $65,000.

Then I asked him what kind of work he did, and he said he did some low level blue collar welding. I told him blue collar work is terrible. He responded that welders can make over $100,000 a year.

I told him that blue collar work is for low-IQ, uneducated people and that the adults in those jobs are losers and people who messed up their lives. I also said blue collar work is fun when you’re a kid, but the adults doing it are there because they’re losers.

It turned out that three blue collar workers had been listening to our conversation and told the kid not to listen to me because I didn’t know what I was talking about.

I then told the kid that when he grows up, he will realize people look down on blue collar workers for a reason and that blue collar adults are not the kind of people he should want to know.

The blue collar workers called me ignorant, yet, from my perspective, they seemed to have chips on their shoulders and came across as unintelligent.

Why are blue- collar workers like this? Are they aware of how the world perceives them?

I wanted to talk numbers because no way most blue collar makes over $100k. Can someone fill me in?

Early replies (first 3)

62342722
>>62342700
Fuck off

62342735
>>62342700
I like this spam, because it counters the AI brainwashing (trades good, factory good, college bad, IT arrogant & overpaid or Indians, close the borders).

62342744
>>62342735
What?
>>62342722
Fuck you.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62344425
fuck trade school. anyone smart should learn to vibe code an app that uses crypto.

62344611
>>62342770
Those people are ether:
1. Retired
2. Trust fund leeches
Now you might say, “nuh uh, they are not parasitic blood sucking invertebrates”
And to that I would say, yes they are.
Money has to be spread out even to the non contributing members and often times instead of focusing on growing their portion; they spend energy on stealing it from the producing members.
About 1/4 of every family is productive.
About 1/2 are ambitious (not profitable)
And 4/4 are living luxuriously
That formula produces 1 producer, 2 layabouts and 1 thief; on average, in every generation.
Basically somebody has to be making the money wether it’s a company ran by the one ambitious and smart family member or my tax dollars in which case you are only advocating for leeching off of somebody and floating the idea it should be me and most people on this board.
So please fuck off and kys, immediately
Please

62344720
You know biz is in dire straits when it's gone the way of /ck/ with so many bot threads to generate a false sense of activity.... Remember to sage these threads

62344811
>>62342770
How poorfag coded are you people that you think just maxing out a couple of credit cards is a lot of money? Like 10-20k might sound like " a lot of money", but even if you aren't rich thats like a year or two of savings, how is that shit going to last you your entire life?

62344833
You won't make it as a blue collar wagie but that doesn't mean its a dead end

Open your own business and build, in the end youre the boss of blue collar wagies and make more than 100k, blue collar work is high in demand and always will, someone has to build the physical shit and it aont be KI

62346901
>>62342700
never change, anon. I enjoy your little gay larps. i'm your fan, you're funny as fuck, I wish we had a biz party somewhere, you'd be the soul of the party unironically speaking

62346960
>>62346901
What larp?

62346974
>>62344611
>trust fund leeches.
Kek. Seething working class.
>>62344811
> How poorfag coded are you people that you think just maxing out a couple of credit cards is a lot of money
Not poor but maxing out one credit card is a lot of money.

62349408
>>62342798
bro you're onto something.
Fake accounts FLOOD the internet. Especially kinky shit like fetlife and the kink subreddits - they will have the exact same contact for totally different account and profiles.
I found 2 accounts that had each other as friends.. they had similar profiles, said they "knew each other online" and 1 used a keyword that the other one was talking to me and using..
there is a MASSIVE psyop happening.

62349422
>>62342700
OP, you clearly haven't heard this enough, you're a faggot.

62351731
>>62346960
everything that you post (on an almost daily basis) that never actually happened outside your autistic mongoloid mind, champ. I love these stories about the "middle class" lol. Keep up the good work soldier. thanks for the laughs (unironically speaking)

62354799
>>62342905
Elliot only drove a BMW because his dad had some cushy Hollywood job working on films like Hunger Games, etc. Pretty sure he wrote something in his manifesto seething about seeing some guy driving a shitbox and still having a beautiful girl in the passenger seat too.

62354802
>>62342834
ha, i was thinking this read exactly like that post

62354821
>>62342828
When they're writing long form fiction they get a pass.

62355262
>>62342700
Electrical contractor here. I live closer to the beach than you do. It’s kind of funny, most skilled tradesmen look down on people like yourself. We feel sorry for you because in the grand scheme of things - you’re worthless. Unable to build or fix anything. Totally dependent on others. Kinda pathetic

62355284
>>62355262
The mind of a blue collar is truly pathetic.

62355301
>>62342770
I haven’t worked in 1,5 months and i can already feel myself wanting to just become passive and not really being impressed or motivated by anything (brain getting fried by dopamine and serotonine). You have to be exactly the kind of ultra degenerate basement dweller who spends all his time in front of screens if you think that not working at all is good. Humans need the struggle in order to feel alive.

62355307
>>62355301
You’re pathetic. Since a little kid, all the classmates of my have been retired.

62355313
>>62355301
> You have to be exactly the kind of ultra degenerate basement dweller who spends all his time in front of screens if you think that not working at all is good. Humans need the struggle in order to feel alive.
You’re probably just poor. People making a top 10% income from investments tend not to work.

62355322
>>62355301
>1.5 months
You don’t even have a non working lifestyle built yet.

62355326
>>62355307
This may be the funniest claim I've seen you make. Absolutely nobody from your school does any kind of work at all? Most people do find things to keep themselves occupied with, beyond mere shitposting on an anonymous uzbekistani finger painting notification board.

62355338
>>62355326
Maybe we grew up in different classes.
On one hand, /biz/ loves to larp as rich and successful and on the other hand, loves to larp as muh productive and I don’t like doing nothing.
Fucking jokes.
I hear people say what you say all the time. Yet look at retired people, I don’t see you saying shit to them. Yet when it is someone young and not working, suddenly they are “unproductive.” Even though these people are clearly rich.

62355342
>>62355307
>>62355313
>>62355322
Kek did i trigger you too much?

62355360
>>62355342
I have never in my life looked at someone not working and thought anything bad.
Growing up, my dad retired when I was like 5. By 10, the parents of all my school friends were retired long ago.
By past college, the differences between the haves and have nots became noticeable because college is where you truly see class differences because high school and under tend to mainly kids from your neighborhood.
You cannot imagine life without work yet kids that grew up like me were surrounded by adults that don’t work. It is the normal. People like me just carry on the lifestyle.
People from successful families don’t break their back.

62355375
>>62355301
Depends what you mean by work. But any occupation today is not a good use of time. Like work as in what? Something you need to get a college degree for? White collar?
Or something blue collar? That’s even dumber.
Starting your own business? Okay sure, if you want to start it as a hobby..?
I don’t know. People build lifestyles when they don’t need to work to live.
Some travel, some have many social gatherings
>Humans need the struggle in order to feel alive.
Oh yeah, the bottom 90% definitely feel alive struggling lol.
Struggling for what? Lmao.

62355404
>>62355301
Sometimes I see the kids in my neighborhood. This isnt an ultra rich 100m a year neighborhood or millions a month neighborhood but in 10-20 years when these kids grow up, it would be a waste of time for them to get a “job.”
Get it?

62357658
>>62355301
Rabbis rabbiposting as usual. Nice try but no, i won't work for (((you)))

62359024
>>62342770
I have 300k...where should i buy a house and get on gibbs? Caliwali?

62359462
>>62342700
I mean someone has to like do stuff u need someone to actually do stuff

62359491
>>62342770
This is called capitalism btw. You either exploit others or u work until you die. Hello knock knock HELLO this is basic capitalism. Wake up everything u guys complain about is due to market forces the Jews are a fantasy of cohesion to keep your little world simple bigga

item.title: You MUST post in this thread if you are waging rn — 71 replies — 129.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
You MUST post in this thread if you are waging rn

Open thread • Replies: 71 • Updated: 2026-06-12 17:54 UTC

OP

wage

Early replies (first 3)

62351330
I'm currently hiding in the bathroom

62351353
>>62351325
Im not desu

62351358
>>62351325
i hate being a wagie so fucking much

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62354589
>>62351325
I'm a third world wagecuck that spends his income buying 5 ounces of silver (or 1/10 ounce of gold) each month

62354608
Wagies, how do you find the time and energy to work on your projects, education, hobbies etc after the day is over?

62354635
>>62351325
I don't want a job where I need to talk to customers all day (some are fine but not all fucking day like a call centre or a shop) and no physical labor. What do?

62354643
>>62354461
Not cashier but something on the floor. That and I also wanted to work a MacDonalds kitchen job too.

62354655
>>62354461
I want to be a store wagie. Tired of insane hours

>t. Wmt trucker

62354661
>>62354608
one of the trick is to live very near your workplace, im lucky as my apartment is only 10 mins max of travel, sometimes i go home and eat on my lunch breaks

this is a bit luck based, but a job where you can slack off if your main shit is done. my boss dont care what I do desu as long as his online pickup stats are good so sometimes I do my shit during work time

other jobs i can think of is something like subway where theres not much to do during downtime and you're often lowly staffed like 2-3 people max so its very relaxed. i dont think you could chill during downtime in something like mcdonalds for example

8 hours of sleep/8 hours of work and usually around 6 hours of free time for me after showering cooking etc

62354675
>>62354655
dam my condolences

62354681
I'm sitting on the toilet now while waging.

I always take multiple shits per day while being paid for it.

62354699
>>62354675
It’s such a joke. Trucking is a nightmare, no wonder jeets do it

62354715
>>62352824
I can't or I get in biiiiiiig trouble

62354716
>>62351325
I being paid to sleep in a hotel because tradies keep fucking up the infrastructure for our machine

62354761
>>62354699
Can't believe how many jets have jumped into the industry. I feel like the average normie isn't aware of their presence in that sector.

62354806
>>62354761
People have no idea how much danger they are in on the highway because of the shitjeets. It’s an existential threats to everybody

62354992
>>62354661
Idk maybe I'm weak but I need to "decompress" after work

62355007
>>62354992
> Idk maybe I'm weak but I need to "decompress" after work
Same. It is so draining.

62356088
I have alot of down time at my workplace too
big issue for me is a 2 hour commute every day but I put up with it since my rent is cheap

62356156
>>62353364
Ash Grove. In that pic I was troubleshooting a truck loading issue. I discovered that our loading system was haunting loading due to some shutdown condition for a split second and tgen deciding to be happy again, most likely fluctuations in the scale wait from the truck or scale shaking while loading. The momentary blip breaks a logic latch forcing a retard of the loading process each time. Now I get to find out how to use timer off delays in unity pro and proworx32 to filter out that momentary blip. Every day is a new problem I have to figure out and I enjoy that.

62356177
>>62356156
I like how my phone knows that I call people retards on 4chan so often it autocorrect a typo of reload to retard

62356574
I'm shitting

62356712
I have an HR adult daycare job. I’m busy for maybe 40 hours a month. Most of my free time is spent shitposting here or reading the news. Today the only thing I have going on is a 1 hour meeting in the afternoon.
>>62356088
I just got my MBA, mostly paid for by the job. I used pretty much all the downtime I typically had to do coursework at work. Shit was so cash.

62356735
I'm taking a break and sitting on a bench at the Bass Pro Shop museum in Dania Beach

62356749
I'm wfh, haven't done anything all afternoon except shitpost on /biz/ and do some laundry

62356784
I'm trying to hire a line cook but nobody wants to work. Need to find a make work adult daycare job.

62357448
>>62356712
How do you get a bullshit HR job if you are a dude? Are you brown?

62357470
>>62351325
I hope we all make it and never have to do this shit again

62357873
I'm at the airport lounge enjoying booze and snacks. Today is remote work day, just finished a teams call, now I just need to wrap up the week by spending about a minute to update one confluence item.

62358052
>>62351325
Nah I live in Europe so I'm done for the week. 100% WFH cybersecurity. Shit's so cash.

62358146
>>62357448
I’m White.
I got lucky and was hired by the HR department’s budget manager, who is also a white male.
My role is more that of an accountant than what you would think of as an HR role, but in the company registry I’m technically HR. My boss (that same budget manager) and I handle the HR department’s finances and try to keep the roasties on budget. They’re pretty deferential, and my boss is very hands on, so that doesn’t leave me with a lot to do beyond monthly reconciliation reports and paying some bills as they come up.
It’s a sweet gig, the only shit part is that it pays peanuts.

62358716
>>62356712
>Today the only thing I have going on is a 1 hour meeting in the afternoon
And they just canceled it, lel. My weekend is starting early.

62359402
>>62351325
I'm in class, but I'm not paying attention to it.

item.title: The person who owns this isn't "on vacation." He does whatever he wants whenever he wants. — 31 replies — 111.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
The person who owns this isn't "on vacation." He does whatever he wants whenever he wants.

Open thread • Replies: 31 • Updated: 2026-06-12 18:10 UTC

OP

The person who owns this isn't "on vacation." He does whatever he wants whenever he wants. He's upper class. And has 3 passports and owns properties and businesses (wealth) around the world. He isn't waiting on a paycheck to drive down to Costco.
Hint: it's a Rothschild property.
Making even a million bucks a year writing code for Elon or Bezos or Brin does NOT put you in the upper class. At all.
I am European and only we have class. We invented class.

Early replies (first 3)

62356062
>>62356048
Before AI, you could write code for ten years and then buy this.

62356086
Got so mad in the other thread you thought you would start a new thread about it LMAO

62356191
this is that same polish guy who was seething in the other thread about class or whatever

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62356197
>>62356048
So who owns it really? Someone with old money?

62356653
>>62356048
(You) don’t own that any more than I do big guy

62356703
>>62356653
he's european so he enjoys being a slave if it means he can be proud about some guy's tacky villa in the mediterranean

62357456
>>62356048
Give me 100 drones and I could destroy that property in like half an hour. Or rent a plane a smear liquid shit all over that mansion lol
>he does whatever he wants! He has...3 passports! properties around the...le world!
Niggers' idea of wealth is truly funny. Knowledge and wisdom are the true wealth in this life.

62357608
>>62356048
Sure but that means you’re Jewish and bound for the pit

62358258
>>62356048
You have a point. American billionaires have the worst taste imaginable

62358413
>go to bed
>wake up to orders in my online store
>hundreds of dollars in profit while I slept
This is the most bare bones no effort business I could stumble in to. It's not impossible

62358433
>>62357456
>wisdom
then why are you here poorfag? theres no wisdom in this shithole.

62358436
>>62356048
Sneed

62358457
>>62356197
>So who owns it really?
The Académie des Beaux-Arts. You can visit the villa if you want. It's like a public museum at this point.

62358606
>>62356048
>AAAACKKKKKKK

62358695
>>62356048
That place looks like a demonic kike festival. Hard pass. Heres a life tip. Don't get caught up with material things or worldly possessions. It looks nice but the people who live such extravagant lives are always empty morally corrupt husks and their children are absolute degenerates. Instead of aspiring to live like rich jews. Aspire spiritual wealth. Talk to God. Meditate on the words of Jesus Christ. Walk on the narrow road that leads to life and do not be mislead by the idolatrous jewish elites that reject the Living God and the Truth

62358945
>>62358433
I need to pay the bills
>>62358695
Based. You are not far from the Kingdom of God, but don't kid yourself, there's still a lot to do

62358989
>>62358606
>"Death is the great equalize...-ACCKKK!!!"

62359005
>>62358989

62359167
>>62356048
>dickriding gloating by association
>this lifestyle was real in my mind
Cool story, op
Lunch is over, time to clock back in

62359177
>>62358695
Based

62359194
>>62358695
>Jesus Christ
>demonic kike

62359210
>>62358989
It still is, but you can live your life like a beta peasant trying to extend your life seeking a philosopher stone (if only to perpetuate your suffering) or live like a chad pharaoh accepting death and building his own sarcophagus and tomb during his lifetime. Two different games, yet the same ending

62359212
>>62358695
Where the fuck is Christ? Why has he foresaken me? Is he even fucking real?

62359254
>>62358989
You don't even know the name of the guy who built those.

62359275
>>62356048
yeah and he is never happy and is made of the same carbon we all are. class is fake. wealth is fake. you can be happy with nothing easier than being happy with everything.

62359283
>>62359212
the real god made himself known to man a lot longer than 2000 years ago. it was pre history, so of course we know nothing about it. abrahamic tradition is nonsense.

62359313
>>62356048
Damn I triggered this barely literate 2nd generation immigrant to America (note I never called him an American - he isn't) so bad. Damn, I am almost sorry since it's Friday but not sorry since you're brown.

62359371
>>62356048
I'm sure his life sucks everyone has a reason to cry about shit no amount of stucco will save your body from pain suffering and misery it is inescapable

62359452
>>62358695
God bless you please pray for me.

62359520
>class is following as many rules as possible while frowning and spending lots of money
Wow sounds like a good time sign me up

62359522
>>62358695
Oh please spare me the weak cope philosophy where Jesus christ literally gets abandoned by God when he needs him the most on the cross so there is no guarantee. God is a child's fantasy of cohesion that the world is simple and suffering has meaning, you think someone is watching you at all times and ur not smart enough to realize that emptiness is structural and is born out of language and it's a insurmountable gap that you can only move through and not ever reach. When u move towards it without expecting anything..that is when u can finally act finally be free from god at least,.to relate to the symbolic world of language differently in a way where u can actually do what you want.

item.title: spacex = $2 Trillion dollars — 25 replies — 100.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
spacex = $2 Trillion dollars

Open thread • Replies: 25 • Updated: 2026-06-12 18:20 UTC

OP

MARKET CAP WORTH $2 TRILLION DOLLARS RIGHT NOW @ $164

LMFAO

Early replies (first 3)

62358200
>>62358179
boomers are right, paying attention to this fake and gay stock market is retarded

just invest in an index fund every month and forget

62358208
>>62358200
honestly they were fucking right the entire time, I should've listened to my father-in-law

62358232
>>62358179
it'll be the biggest crash in history. And that's not a prediction, it's a spoiler.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62358264
>>62358200
>just invest in an index fund every month and forget
they are buying SPCX too LAMO

62358266
>>62358179
Wait and see it drops to less than $1 trillion in a week.

62358268
soon it'll be double digits

62358282
it's dumping to fuck LMAO

62358291
>>62358179
ALWAYS inverse reddit. Always.

62358339
Reminds me of the South Sea stock bubble.

>muh SPACE!!
>muh EXPLORATION!!

it's a completely hollow and speculative corporation

62358364
>>62358291
what is reddit saying?

62358370
>ITT seething gay bears who don't get to make an easy 20%

62358387
the entire economy is fake and gay.

62358395
>>62358179
>MARKET CAP WORTH $2 TRILLION DOLLARS RIGHT NOW @ $164
Except that is only a small portion of the shares. If 100% of shares were publicly traded the price pressure would collapse so it really doesn't have $2 trillion market cap. It's a part of the scam of IPOs

62358404
I believe Space X is the corporation that will bring on the planned global crash and economic reset.

That's the only purpose of Space X

62358424
Also I believe Trump rushed the news of an "imminent signing" with Iran just to prop up this Space X IPO.

The timing is just amusing. The supposed deal with Iran is already falling apart now that the IPO happened

62358427
>>62358200
that's a solid approach if you have a decent job and only plan to retire around maybe your mid fifties earliest, probably a bit later.
it requires basically zero brainpower to pull off too, you can just automate it.
but it will never make you significantly richer than your regular income already made you anyway, which is what most of /biz/ is trying to aim for.

62358444
>>62358339
I just never re-enter, at least not without some serious time delay or actual changes that justify the change in price.
If I pulled out then I did so for a reason, and I'll just look for something new.

62358451
I pity all of you who don't get on the Tulip Wagon in time.

62358454
>>62358404
>planned global crash
how does a 550 million float on a company bring planetary economic crash?

62358455
>>62358444
checked

62358465
>>62358454
fuck you just trust me on this.

Damn, you guys just can't let a doomer doompost a lil bit

62358467
>>62358454
Well here’s how Burry explains it, though of course he’s been constantly predicting crashes ever since back when he was right once
https://x.com/BullTheoryio/status/2061029970236133554

62358473
>>62358395
Smells like any vc scam crypto tokenomics from israel.

62359572
>>62358179
>>62358232
SpaceX did a nice pop, you rarely see it nowdays. Strictly speaking it means they underpriced to reward their investors.

62359603
There are less than $20B of shares being traded to justify an imaginary value of $2T

item.title: THe jews in the US are insane — 18 replies — 72.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
THe jews in the US are insane

Open thread • Replies: 18 • Updated: 2026-06-12 18:20 UTC

OP

all these freak pedophile tech kike billioniares are absolute sickos

Trump basically handed all of the US tech sector to Jews like Ellison, Musk, Altman who now can legally steal all of the US taxpayer money and the whole US milliatry is now in control of israel, meaning, if US citizens start to revolt, jews will tell Americans to whack their fellow citizens so the jews can contine to lie and steal from the US taxpayer

tech jews, will get all the money and power to create their kike god ai, which is here to lie and steal from people even more.

BUt at least, Musk is now a trillioniare, wow, how cool is our life, we now have the chance of a lifetime to bow down to an autist who fathered x children, of whom 3 or 4 of them are turning from girls into boys or the other way around

But dont hate, you can now bow down to a trillioniare and buy his shitty cars that track everything you do, isnt that great?

You americans are such a bunch of weak jew worshipping faggots

Early replies (first 3)

62354832
>>62354824
Not my problem.... (partially mine too :(. )

62354836
actually, trump gave israel controll of the US milliatry
YOu guys are such pathetic weak suckers, why you even have guns?
Now that your fcking kike president basically robs the US blind, you faggots sit their and get your dick hard because you can now worship a trillioniare instead of fighting for your fucking country
weak fcks

62354840
>>62354836
The MIC has been its own deep state entity for longer than you've been pretending to pay attention, sister.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62355009
>>62354824
its over we pussy americans have all these guns and we let pedo tech billionaires ruin our lives

we are so buck broken and mind raped its not even funny

62355058
>>62354824

62355073

62355086
>>62355009
>make someone work for a carrot all his life
>trap him in marginal cost of action
>now you can slowly boil the water
easy

62355845
>>62354824
I agree with you, however you need a few corrections. 1) The US has no money. It is 40 trillion in debt. 2) The bitch government of yours is half staffed by dual citizens of that country and the USA but pledge allegiance to only the foreign one 3) The military is under the control of the government. Who is in control of your government? The federal reserve. So I agree with your assessment for the most part but you forgot some things.

62356713
>>62355845
Who owns the Federal Reserve?

62356744
>>62354824
Truth nuke

62356768
>>62354824
>You americans are such a bunch of weak jew worshipping faggots

Not really. Europeans are the faggots. I'm European. We could have attracted people like Musk to work in Europe. And hundred thousands of other hard working engineers and entrepreneurs. Instead we have ideological subhuman leaders who get their positions for having a vagina like Merkel, van der Leyen, Kallas and so on.

You're a fucking idiot who should be deported to North Korea or Russia

62356814
>>62354824
I appreciate Elon Musk and there's nothing you can do about it; I'm also European.

62356840
>>62354824
How do I invest in child sacrifice to molek?!?

62356876
Defund the jews & im shorting spacex all corrupt tax evasion bullshit

62356922
the reason why the juice hate the nation state and combat nationalism everywhere is because it's natural for people to want their own to be at the top of the societal pyramid. but if you subvert the the leaders and ultimately destroy the nation through social engineering and migration, you get a society where the juice can easily get the power and hold it while everyone else just fights among each other, while increasingly turning into a turd-coloured blob.

62359097
>>62354824

62359126

Open thread • Replies: 13 • Updated: 2026-06-12 18:21 UTC

OP

>In the UK your direction in life is permanently fixed based on a decision you made at 16 which was influenced by a decision you made at 14
>If you leave the UK there is absolutely no way around this in order to transition to a different field
What a laughably retarded system this country has.

Early replies (first 3)

62358816
You deserve everything that is happening for leaving the EU
fuck you traitor

62358836
>>62358804
living in the UK sounds comfy. just resign to being a retarded peasant slave and everything becomes so much simpler.

62358839
>>62358804
dont very educated people make shit wages in UK im talking Lawyers making 20k GBP.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62358859
>>62358836
>>62358839
That's why I intend on leaving but I can't very well go into another field when I do leave because I am chained by the idiocy of the UK's educational system

62358894
>>62358836
their benefits are bussin no cap u get a counsel flat and pretty damn good gibs man

sounds like NEET heaven ngl

62358905
>>62358894
*council

62358958
>>62358894
Not much of a heaven when you realise your neighbours are druggies and teenage single mothers with their criminal bf occasionally visiting

62358988
>>62358958
compare this to what your life is like as a poor person in the USA. you aren't getting gibs unless you're medically disabled or a woman.
>living in a car and getting harassed by businesses, the police, normies, the homeless, niggers, etc.
>living on the streets and getting robbed and raped by giga schizophrenic homeless on meth

62359003
>>62358894
It's hell on fucking Earth. You will get harassed or attacked at random by retarded apes who can't speak English, your dating prospects are drug-addicted whores who can barely spew out a sentence and look like ogres, your friends are guaranteed drug addicts obsessed with football and alcohol to distract themselves from how nightmarish life is here, and because the education system is intentionally designed to stifle people from excelling due to being obtuse and locking you out of certain pathways based on misguided decisions you made at impressionable ages, you are permanently assigned to an underclass where you cannot make it out. And even if you do leave, no foreign college will accept you because the optional, choice-dependent 16-18 exams are weighed the same as the mandatory exams from 13-18 that encompass all essential subjects as a requirement. If you picked the subjects you enjoyed at A-Level, then you're fucked! Enjoy your life of misery

62359381
Doomed from birth because UK mind broke you into thinking you have no agency

62359565
you genuinely do have no agency in the UK though, you apply anywhere and they dont want you, theres degree inflation, all the low wage jobs are taken by immigrants, all the "high wage jobs" are poverty wages and you cant get those either.

i wanna throw up when i see americans complain about "only" making 40k when thats considered a good salary here.

62359576
>>62358804
*Chops off your head*

62359617
>>62359565
most americans aren't making $40k
the median income here ignores the vast numbers of unemployed and underemployed.

And even if we pretend the median income is real or representative, almost half of people working full time don't make that much.

62358885

62358947

near wall street as well . Which some people get close to mega routers so they get slight advantage on trading
Also not to mention how much the military will be using said data centersc
Also big backlash about datacenters keeping them close to dc means they can deploy natty guard.

62359009
>>62358885
>There's nothing good about DC. And definitely nothing that would make someone want to do business in the area.

62359049

62359055

62359330

62359374

62359386
>>62359311

62359398
>>62358803

62359460

62359499

ACK

62359427

>>62359417

item.title: Chainlinkies are the ones that try to make fun of XRP chads by spamming the boom-meme. — 40 replies — 35.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
Chainlinkies are the ones that try to make fun of XRP chads by spamming the boom-meme.

Open thread • Replies: 40 • Updated: 2026-06-12 17:19 UTC

OP

Chainlinkies are the ones that try to make fun of XRP chads by spamming the boom-meme. Look at this poster who copies and pastes an entire thread just to shit it up and make fun of XRP holders: >>62338460

The funny thing? He forgot to remove the (You) when he copied and pasted the whole thing. But you can see his ID is different.

So my best guess is it's probably a single poster who constantly switches id to force this shitty meme. Probably a chainlink bagholder.

Early replies (first 3)

62339778
Imagine caring this much, holy shit. Adult bully victim no doubt

62339781
>>62339778
Lol of course I don't care so much but it goes to show how pathetic those link tards are trying to force that unfunny boom-xrp meme. The guy thinks if he switches id it looks like more people are in on it but that retard forgot to remove the (You) from his own post.

You are just butthurt you got called out hard and i'm gonna show this to everyone on /biz/ so they know who is really responsible for forcing that dumb meme.

62339829
>>62339778
idk bout that... xrp apparently lives rent free in linkbaggies minds

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62340374
>>62339768
Why would anyone buy Chainlink or xrp I don't understand. Crypto is there to buy drugs online. Can you buy drugs online with Chainlink ? No. Can you buy drugs online with xrp? No. Case closed.

62340393
>>62339768
I don't hold link either tho
KABOOOOOOOOOOOM

62340516
everybody hates u dumb stinks

62340978
>>62339781
>words words words
It's funny how you're immediately identifiable by the spergy seethe that radiates from your posts.

Even funnier, >>62339844 posting the madmen meme.
>"We don't think about Linkies at all!!"
>Op literally creates a thread ranting about Chainlink because some other random thread that doesn't mention Chainlink could have been made by a Linkie

62340989
>>62340978
>TLDR linkjeet seethe

didnt read lol

62340992
BOOOOOOOOOOM

BULLISH AT XRP

62341232
Bumping this bullsih thread
KABOOOOOOOOOOOOOOM

62342495
>>62339768
>My retarded shitposts made someone so mad he made an expose thread on me
FXCKING BULLISH KABOOOOOOOOOOOM

62343674
>>62339768
>>62339781
>>62339835
>>62340989
>linkcucks and xrpaypigs having a retarded biz slapfight as they both go to 0

62344317
KABOOOOOOOOM>>62339768

62344795
>>62339781
This. I don't hold either but the link spam is so fucking stupid and annoying. They got decimated in a war length campaign of threads and saw zero wins and now it is over and over with this same shitty failed meme that ironically got funny when XRP posters just did it back to them to mock them. I have zero dog in this race but XRP is the clear winner in the messaging war.

62344908
>>62344795
>t. the same person a different id
manufacturing consensus on a dead board is pretty cringe desu senpai

62345267
KABOOOOOOOOOOOOOM
link

62345354
Except XRP is actually being used

62347256
KABOOOOOOOOM

62347334
>>62344795

62347434
>>62339781
>”I don’t care”
>paragraph about how much he cares

62347439

62348331

62348340
>>62348331
Must....not......boom...must...not.......
KABOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOM
BULLISH AT THE TICKER XRP

62349668
>>62344908
You are incapable of conceiving of someone who just calls out your hypocrisy and annoying shilling. This is why you are how you are and you are like this because you do this. It is circular and self-feeding and swallowing. You are in a vortex, accusing me of doing exactly what you are in an even more retarded way than you are even accusing me of doing.
>>62347334
See the above reply. Same applies to you.

62349808
>>62349668
You are the verbose xrp shill though. You made this >>62349672 reply to the xrp general minutes after this one here in the same verbose style.

62349917
>>>62349808
Mentally ill VPN linkbaggie

62350205
>>62349808
It is indeed extremely obvious whenever he posts. Lately he is always talking about "muh XRP kept it's gains from the Trump pump!" yet XRP is down 70% from the ATH it made during said pump. Insanely delusional.

62354048
Hello linkers and ripplies. Actually, XRPL uses Chainlink.
XRP is powered by Chainlink.

62354051

62354245
>>62354051

62354644
>>62339768

62355365

item.title: Most Americans can afford to buy RE. Why don't you have a house yet? — 8 replies — 32.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Most Americans can afford to buy RE. Why don't you have a house yet?

Open thread • Replies: 8 • Updated: 2026-06-12 18:25 UTC

OP

Most Americans can afford to buy RE. Why don't you have a house yet?

Early replies (first 3)

62354346
>>62354049
>india 4th
can't indians, like, just overtake some random patch of land somewhere and just live there? they don't even need WCs...

62354474
>>62354049
Because real estate is a shitty investment. No better than bonds in most cases. If you want RE exposure buy a REIT stock.

62354615
Had a house once but forced to sell since cost of maintenance (combined with all my other life expenses) winded up draining my savings - yes I couldn't save money anymore from my stagnant wage job. Said job also cornered me with a few upcoming retirees' workloads without any plan of promotion for me. Was forced to sell the house and quit my job without a backup plan. No backup plan since every job in my surrounding area paid only half of what I made. Horrible situation all around, was forced to move home. That all happened circa 2022, and I haven't been able to find a new decent paying job since. It's almost like I got checkmated. Sigh.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62354631
>>62354049
Waiting until im ready to retire so i can accelerate depreciation on a rental and roth convert my whole pretax ira at zero percent then hopefully be able to sell and capture 250k tax free cap gains

62354701
>>62354474
not having to pay rent is a superb investment

62355121
>>62354049
Indians should move to Britain for cheaper housing

62359575
>>62355121
Too many pakies there sir.

62359645
>>62354049
>10% says they have financial difficulties with housing
Kek who tf believes this bs

62358080

62358134
>>62358054

62358142
>>62358041
THE GAP UP!! Oooooooo

So is $300 really the target or is $500 much more preferable?

62358189
>>62358134
no for real, i will buy at $40

62358199

62358254

>yearly revenue 18.67 billion

62358294

62359006

62359080

Will it be better to buy stock or place a bet before a launch

62359092
>>62358134
i will buy at $20

62359116
>>62359092
keep your heads buried in the sand, more for me

62359127
>>62359116
MACD is already going negative lmao

62359169
>>62359127
>>62359127
been trading for an hour. zero structural meaning. take your charts and shove em up your ass for the first month

62359199
>>62359169
>THE PRICE ACTION DOESN'T MATTER! IGNORE THE CHARTS BECAUSE.... YOU JUST HAVE TO, OKAY???
cult

62359304
>>62359199
MACD is irrelevant right now because it's mathematically impossible to calculate a true trend until a stock has been trading for at least 60 to 90 days. like i said . take your charts and shove it up your ass

62359392
>>62359304
>There is no trend to follow!
>You can't use TA on a 1 day old shitter!
I don't care about whatever memestock /biz/ is having vaginal contractions from but I've heard this before and it just so happen that this other thing blew up to a multi hundred MC shitcoin. You're unironically making this IPO seem bullish.
